payload.answer: Compiled the article-style input into small, traceable atomic memory cards without treating them as user-specific biographical facts.
citations: AI memory systems need durable source evidence.
Atomic memory cards should be small and traceable.
A semantic index can improve recall, but the application database must own lifecycle and conflict state.

entity_resolution.reason: Input describes general design principles rather than a specific existing user/entity profile.

memory_cards.statement: AI memory systems need durable source evidence.
Atomic memory cards should be small and traceable.
A semantic index can improve recall in an AI memory system.
The application database must own lifecycle and conflict state for memory records.

details: Created four atomic principle memory cards.
Preserved source ambiguity by using medium confidence.
No entity merge or conflict detected.
